header.description: Automatically append form responses to a Microsoft Excel workbook in OneDrive

name.label: Plugin Name
name.hint: A descriptive name to identify this integration

worksheet.label: Worksheet Name
worksheet.hint: Name of the worksheet tab where rows will be appended. Defaults to Sheet1.

connection.title: Microsoft Account
connection.description: Connect your Microsoft 365 account to allow writing to Excel Online
connection.notConnectedHint: Connect your Microsoft 365 account to start syncing responses to an Excel workbook. A new workbook will be created automatically on the first submission.
connection.authFailed: Microsoft authentication failed. Please try connecting again.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1: On the first form submission, a new Excel workbook is created automatically in your OneDrive.
howItWorks.step2: A header row is written with all form field names, submission time, and response ID.
howItWorks.step3: Every subsequent submission appends a new row to the configured worksheet.

validation.notConnected: Please connect your Microsoft 365 account first

toasts.disconnectedDescription: Your Microsoft account has been disconnected
